close_reason: Multi-language E2E test complete - Go and Rust working together
description:
Test scenario: Project with Go, Python, and Rust code

1. Create project with all three languages
2. Add cross-language dependencies (e.g., Python calling Rust via PyO3, Go calling C)
3. Verify all deps files generated correctly
4. Run 'tk build //...' - all targets build
5. Run 'tk test //...' - all tests pass
6. Modify deps in one language, verify others unaffected

Validates: multi-language support, isolation between toolchains
title: E2E: Multi-language monorepo
